finding.summary: Significant spectral slope from 100 Hz to 4 kHz: 100 Hz at -18 dB, 1 kHz at -24 dB, 4 kHz at -30 dB. This 12 dB drop across the range indicates a likely dull, indistinct sound.
finding.probable_cause: The kick source content lacks high-frequency energy, and no EQ is applied on the bus to compensate.
finding.confidence_reason: Only three 1/3-octave bands are available, limiting full spectral analysis, and the silence fraction is low (0.05) so levels are not significantly diluted by dead air.

evidence_refs.description: 1/3-octave band levels: 100 Hz at -18 dB, 1 kHz at -24 dB, 4 kHz at -30 dB

proposal.reason: The track has no existing FX plugins to modify. The observed spectral imbalance cannot be corrected using allowed operations (set_track_volume, set_track_pan, set_fx_bypass, set_fx_param require an existing plugin). A new EQ plugin would be needed but insertion is not supported.
proposal.rejection_reason: No existing FX to adjust; adding new plugins is outside the scope of supported operations.
